articles.author: David Hollerith
articles.title: Bank of America joins big bank peers in reporting rising profits, calls US economy 'resilient' - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Bank of America said on Wednesday that profits leaped 17% from a year ago.
articles.content:
Bank of America (BAC) said on Wednesday that profits leaped 17% from a year ago.
The countrys second-largest bank reported profits rose to $8.6 billion, or $1.11 per share, exceeding the $1.01 per s… [+3409 chars]
